creator: cjr@cruwe.de
text:
Having implemented the tips I received via mail (i.e., FETCH_ARGS and
version string in plist), I follow with a revised patch.

Thanks for the consideratuion so far, cheers,
-- 
Christopher

Punctuation matters:
"Let's eat Grandma" or "Let's eat, Grandma" - Punctuation saves lives.
"A panda eats shoots and leaves" or "A panda eats, shoots, and leaves" -
Punctuation teaches proper biology.
